enrichment method: Enrichment of the desaturase activity by Butyl-S Sepharose 6 Fast Flow
fractionation method: followed by HiTrap Capto Q anion-exchange chromatography
fragmentation method: fragmentation of the 15 most abundant multiply charged precursor ions by higher energy collisional dissociation
instrument: Ultimate 3000 RSLCnano coupled to a Q-Exactive Plus mass spectrometer
ionization type: Electrospray ionization quadrupole time-of-flight mass spectrometry analysis
